## Epic

Page Design Issues (Dummy Data Only)

## Description

- Add cookie consent banner with granular preferences modal (mock)
- Persist preferences locally; allow changes from settings
- Provide privacy policy link and summary
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Banner height ≤ 96px; clear accept/reject/options
  - Modal groups preferences with toggles; 44px touch targets
  - Consent state visible in settings page

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Banner and modal implemented
- [ ] Preferences persist locally
- [ ] Settings integration works
- [ ] PR includes screenshots of banner, modal, and settings

`frontend`, `privacy`, `compliance`, `priority-medium`
